description: Networks — Create, join, and govern praxisiq networks with roles and membership

tasks.title: Network Service — Docker container
tasks.prompt:
Implement the Network Service as specified in SNAPP-TRD.md WU-2.1 and WU-2.2 (M2.1 + M2.2).

Create Snapp.Service.Network with:

1. Program.cs: Minimal API, DI, dual-host, OpenAPI (same pattern as auth/user services)

2. Endpoints/NetworkEndpoints.cs — all with OpenAPI metadata:
   POST /api/networks — create network (generates ULID, creates META + default roles steward/member/associate, adds creator as steward, creates inverse UMEM# entry)
   GET /api/networks — list all networks (paginated), indicate user's membership status
   GET /api/networks/{netId} — get network detail with user's role if member
   PUT /api/networks/{netId} — update network (steward only)
   GET /api/networks/{netId}/members — list members (must be member, paginated)
   GET /api/networks/mine — list user's networks (query UMEM# items)

3. Endpoints/MembershipEndpoints.cs:
   POST /api/networks/{netId}/apply — submit application (creates APP# item, queues notification for stewards)
   GET /api/networks/{netId}/applications — list pending (steward/reviewer only, query GSI-PendingApps)
   POST /api/networks/{netId}/applications/{userId}/decide — approve/deny (on approve: create MEMBER# + UMEM# + increment count + notify; on deny: notify)
   POST /api/networks/{netId}/invite — direct invite (steward only, skip application)

4. Repositories/NetworkRepository.cs implementing INetworkRepository — all DynamoDB operations against snapp-networks table

5. Permission checking: verify caller's role has required Permission flags before allowing action

6. Dockerfile + add to docker-compose.yml as snapp-network (port 8083)
7. Update Kong config: route /api/networks/* → snapp-network:8080 (JWT required)

8. Integration tests in test/Snapp.Service.Network.Tests/:
   - Create network → creator is steward with all permissions
   - Default roles created (steward, member, associate)
   - Apply → application in pending queue
   - Approve → user becomes member, count incremented, notification queued
   - Deny → user not added
   - Non-steward cannot approve/deny
   - Non-member cannot see member list
   - Invite bypasses application
   - /mine returns only user's networks

Tests must authenticate via real auth flow (magic link through Papercut).
tasks.done_when: Network service runs in Docker. Create/join/manage networks through Kong. Membership workflow works. Integration tests pass.

tasks.title: Network UI — Directory, creation wizard, members, settings
tasks.prompt:
Implement all network UI pages using MudBlazor as specified in SNAPP-TRD.md WU-2.3.

1. Pages/Network/Directory.razor (/networks):
   - MudDataGrid or MudTable of available networks
   - Each row: name, description preview, MudChip member count, status badge (Member/Applied/Join)
   - MudButton 'Create Network' → /networks/create
   - MudTextField search filter

2. Pages/Network/Create.razor (/networks/create):
   - MudStepper:
     Step 1: MudTextField Name [Required] + MudTextField Description
     Step 2: MudTextArea Charter
     Step 3: MudSelect Template (General/Custom) — for future vertical config
   - On submit: POST /api/networks → NavigateTo(/networks/{newId})

3. Pages/Network/Home.razor (/networks/{netId}):
   - MudCard dashboard: member count, recent activity summary
   - MudButton quick links: Feed, Discussions, Members
   - If steward: MudBadge with pending application count

4. Pages/Network/Members.razor (/networks/{netId}/members):
   - MudDataGrid of ProfileCards with MudChip role badges
   - MudTextField search by name
   - Steward actions: MudMenu per member (Change Role, Remove)

5. Pages/Network/Settings.razor (/networks/{netId}/settings):
   - Only renders for stewards (check role)
   - MudTabs: General (name/desc/charter edit), Roles (manage definitions), Applications (review queue)
   - Applications tab: MudList of pending apps with Approve/Deny MudButtons

6. Apply flow: MudDialog modal with MudTextArea for application text, submit → MudAlert success

7. Update left sidebar (MainLayout MudDrawer):
   - MudSelect for network switching (user's networks from /api/networks/mine)
   - MudNavMenu links update based on selected network
   - Store selected network in NetworkState

8. bUnit tests for all components.

Test manually: create network, invite/apply a second user, approve, see them in member list.
tasks.done_when: Network directory, creation wizard, member list, settings page all functional with MudBlazor. Sidebar network switcher works. bUnit tests pass.

tasks.title: Sprint 3 integration validation
tasks.prompt:
Validate Sprint 3 end-to-end.

1. Run `scripts/start-and-test.sh`
2. Run all test suites: Shared, Auth, User, Network, Client
3. Integration test walkthrough:
   a. Login as User A (magic link flow)
   b. Create network 'Test Guild'
   c. Verify User A is steward
   d. Login as User B (different email)
   e. User B applies to 'Test Guild'
   f. Login as User A, approve application
   g. Verify User B appears in member list
   h. User B cannot access settings (not steward)
4. Write validation report to .claude/reports/sprint-3-validation.md
5. Commit all fixes.
tasks.done_when: All tests pass. Two-user network creation/joining verified. Validation report written.
